headline: Big Consulting Giants Are Going All-In on AI While Startups Eat Their Lunch

stories.title: OpenAI's Frontier Alliances: Why Consultants Are Now AI's Best Salespeople
stories.summary: OpenAI just locked in multi-year deals with BCG, McKinsey, Accenture, and Capgemini to help enterprises actually adopt its AI products. Basically, consultants are now OpenAI's go-to-market strategy.
stories.takeaway: Consulting firms went from building AI tools to becoming AI distribution networks—and that's actually smart for solving enterprise adoption

stories.title: Accenture's Sovereign AI Play + Mistral Deal = The Real Infrastructure Bet
stories.summary: Accenture just jumped 8% after announcing a Mistral AI partnership plus the Verum Partners acquisition. Wall Street's seeing this as proof that "Physical AI" (robotics, smart infrastructure) is the next $70B market.
stories.takeaway: Accenture's pivoting from "billable hours" to owning the infrastructure layer—basically positioning itself as the architect of AI-driven operations, not just the advisor.

stories.title: Tiny Startup Just Replaced McKinsey's $500K Reports With $50K AI—On Live Deals
stories.summary: DiligenceSquared closed a $5M seed round and is already doing due diligence for PE firms managing $2+ trillion in AUM using AI agents. McKinsey's traditional model is lowkey getting disrupted in real-time.
stories.takeaway: The real threat to consulting isn't internal AI tools—it's startups building domain-specific agents that do the work 10x cheaper and faster, but with billion-dollar risk if they miss nuance.

watchNext.title: Deloitte Launches Enterprise AI Navigator Platform
watchNext.why: Deloitte's treating AI as a strategic asset, not just a tool. Their new platform has an AI opportunity scanner, business impact evaluator, and agent creation hub—basically commoditizing consulting work.

watchNext.title: How AI Is Creating an Internal Rift at McKinsey, Bain, BCG
watchNext.why: Junior consultants are lowkey exhausted—shorter deadlines, less creativity, more AI pressure from senior partners. This tension between what AI promises and what actually works is way more real than the PR.
